name: 06-23-split-permissions
title: 拆分 permissions/mod.rs — 抽 check.rs + AuditKind 按域分
description: agent/permissions/mod.rs 2814 行承担 4 个职责。拆出: (1) check.rs (5-tier 主函数 297 行 + helpers), (2) store.rs (PermissionStore + register/resolve/cancel), (3) audit_kinds.rs (AuditKind 17 个 variant 按域拆:Tool / Mode / Message / Worker), (4) payload.rs (PermissionAskPayload)。mod.rs 只留 re-exports。
creator: Carlos-home
